headline: A Look At Constellation Brands (STZ) Valuation After Mixed Returns And Cash Flow Outlook
summary: Recent returns put Constellation Brands in context Constellation Brands (STZ) has returned about 0.7% over the past day and 1.2% over the past week, while showing a 2.4% decline over the past month and an 8.6% gain over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Constellation Brands. That recent 3 month share price return of 8.6% comes after a weaker patch, and sits against a 1 year total shareholder return of a 15.5% loss, suggesting improving sentiment but still mixed long term outcomes...

headline: Constellation Brands Expands Non Alcoholic Lineup With Hop Wtr Acquisition
summary: Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) has acquired full ownership of Hop Wtr, a non-alcoholic sparkling water brand infused with hops and adaptogens. The deal expands STZ's non-alcoholic portfolio at a time when demand for no- and low-alcohol options continues to build. Hop Wtr will sit alongside STZ's existing beer, wine, and spirits businesses as the company responds to moderation and wellness trends. Constellation Brands, best known for beer, wine, and spirits labels, is pushing further into...
